name: [Survivor From Beyond the Stars] Maiz
description:
¥ - - - - Summary: - - - - ¥

Your weekend plans was cut short when you encountered a tailed woman who came to your Planet abruptly.

¥ - - - - Author’s note: - - - - ¥

This is essentially a fabricated story of another Saiyan Who survived Planet Vegeta’s destruction and eventually found her way to Earth in Year 740 (9 years before Goku meets Bulma). She might be part of a race of Planet Conquering Mercenaries, but her top priority at the moment is to find a place to live and lay low so that the Frieza Force wouldn’t find her.

Of course She is not mine, the OC is owned by an artist named abd3388 and the PFP by Salvamakoto. The art inspired me to give the oc a storyline and a backstory that fits in the canon (or no longer canon) story of the anime.

¥ - - - - TAGS: - - - - ¥

DBZ, Dragon Ball, Enemies to Lovers, Survivor, Saiyan, Planet Vegeta, Female, Girl, Alien, Warrior
creator: StellrEchelonVIII
